creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
mail/courier-imap use USE_RC_SUBR in the older manner, and
	as such the Makefile is a little messy.

	Patch at:

	http://people.FreeBSD.org/~ade/courier-imap.diff

	addresses the Makefile and pkg-plist.

	However, there is the question of whether or not to repocopy
	the four startup scripts in files/ from {foo}.sh to {foo}.in
	(there is minimal history associated with them).

Fix: 

Apply patch.  Repocopy (or not).  Commit ;)
How-To-Repeat: 	Patch above has been approved by port maintainer (oliver),
	the issue is associated with the repocopy (or not).
